concerns.detail: Deletion of substantive criticism regarding a professor's qualifications and employment history at specific companies (LLM frontier labs, ByteDance Seed), suggesting suppression of legitimate observations rather than routine cleanup.
concerns.excerpt: LLM frontier labs全投了一遍根本没人要他。现在能在seed也是因为早期刚在美国发展招不到人的时候让他混进去的。在字节里也是人人喊打。

concerns.detail: Insertion contains identifying details about a specific lab member (student), including social media identity (Xiaohongshu academic influencer) and specific publication details (TPAMI), sufficient to de-anonymize the individual.
concerns.excerpt: 组里有著名xhs学术女网红，tpami是被送的，学术能力为0，人是最mean的

concerns.detail: Replacement reveals identifying information about specific students including a PhD student identified by initials 'sp', and sensitive mental health details (depression, psychiatric medication, 'went crazy') of undergraduate students from specific universities (985/211).
concerns.excerpt: 把很多985/211大学的top1的本科生搞成抑郁症要吃药(后面直接疯了)...他妈的sp你真是纯出生

concerns.detail: Replacement contains severe personal insults directed at a specific PhD student (identified by initials 'sp'), using profanity ('纯出生' - pure bastard) and unsupported character judgments ('这phd学生是真逆天').
concerns.excerpt: 他妈的sp你真是纯出生...这phd学生是真逆天
